'''FE-3PO''' was a [[3PO-series protocol droid/Legends|3PO-series protocol droid]] active during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Programmed for [[Human/Legends|Human]]-[[Cyborg/Legends|Cyborg]] relations, FE-3PO was also an expert on the other prominent individual [[Droid/Legends|droids]] and droid models in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] [[Rebellion era|at the time]].
